name: Genesis Energy
description: At Genesis, we know energy is part of everyday life. Our focus is on making it straightforward and easy to live with, supporting homes and businesses today while helping New Zealand move toward a more sustainable energy future. We back this with products and tools designed to fit naturally into how people live.

We back this with products and tools designed to fit naturally into how people live.

name: Electric Kiwi
description:
Electric Kiwi is all about being fair, flexible, and saving you money. Our mission is to make mobile, broadband, and power better for Kiwis.
We offer choice deals and awesome service, without any sneaky contracts or exit fees. Plus, all our customers get a daily free hour of off-peak power.

name: Contact Energy
description: As one of New Zealand’s largest energy generators and retailers, Contact has over 650,000 customer connections with electricity, gas, broadband and mobile plans. Contact operates 11 power stations using geothermal, hydro and thermal energy to generate electricity for Aotearoa.
raw_text_snippet:
As one of New Zealand’s largest energy generators and retailers, Contact has over 650,000 customer connections with electricity, gas, broadband and mobile plans. Contact operates 11 power stations using geothermal, hydro and thermal energy to generate electricity for Aotearoa.
Contact believes home should be the best place in the world. Cosy, warm and connected. With free power options along with competitive gas, broadband and mobile pricing, it’s always good to be home with Contact.

name: Nova Energy
description: Nova is a multi-service retailer and energy generator, offering electricity, natural gas, broadband, landline phone and mobile services to homes and businesses nationwide.
raw_text_snippet:
Nova is a multi-service retailer and energy generator, offering electricity, natural gas, broadband, landline phone and mobile services to homes and businesses nationwide. 
Hello, we’re Nova – it’s great to meet you.  We provide great value energy, broadband and mobile services to Kiwi homes and businesses all over.  Because we're Kiwis too, we believe in genuine, friendly service. So, we put a lot of our energy into treating people right, keeping things simple, and delivering what we promise.

name: Adonis Energy
description: Adonis Energy’s smart monitoring, bundling, and smart plans allow you to control your cost of living, profit margins, and consumption - providing everything you need to put your home and business in the driver's seat for energy delivery.
raw_text_snippet:

name: Ecotricity
description: Ecotricity is New Zealand’s first and only Toitū climate positive certified electricity product. Your electricity consumption is matched to 100% renewable energy sources on an annualised basis.
raw_text_snippet:
Ecotricity is New Zealand’s first and only Toitū climate positive certified electricity product. Your electricity consumption is matched to 100% renewable energy sources on an annualised basis.
Ecotricity is a Toitū climate positive certified electricity product that supports access to renewable energy while recognising the essential role electricity plays in everyday life. name: 2degrees
description: 2degrees is a leading full-service telecommunications provider, committed to fighting for fair for Kiwis and businesses. 2degrees provides broadband, mobile, and electricity services to more than two million customers. Since its launch, 2degrees has been on a mission to disrupt the market, standing up for fairness and flexibility in an industry that needed change.

name: Mercury NZ
description: Mercury is a leading multi‑utility retailer, offering power, gas, broadband and mobile services. Mercury’s generation assets produce electricity from 100% renewable sources: hydro, geothermal and wind. Their retail operations cover residential and small to medium‑sized business customers. They own their ISP network, helping connect New Zealanders to reliable fibre and wireless broadband services.

name: Toast Electric
description: Toast Electric is New Zealand’s only not-for-profit electricity retailer, with a focus on social equity and a fair energy future for everyone. Toast is operated by Wellington-based Sustainability Trust, who has been supporting households in energy hardship with practical solutions for more than 20 years.

Toast is operated by Wellington-based Sustainability Trust, who has been supporting households in energy hardship with practical solutions for more than 20 years.

description: Meridian Energy is New Zealand’s largest renewable energy generator and a major electricity retailer. Meridian Energy is committed to delivering clean energy for a fairer and healthier world.

name: Powershop
description: Powershop puts customers in control of how they shop for power. The digital shop gives customers the freedom and flexibility to help them manage their power bills and save money in the process.
raw_text_snippet:
Powershop puts customers in control of how they shop for power. The digital shop gives customers the freedom and flexibility to help them manage their power bills and save money in the process.
Powershop burst on to the scene in 2009 as a fully online electricity retailer. Today Powershop provides electricity to around 150,000 Kiwis across the country. name: Pulse Energy
description: Pulse Energy is proud to be 100% community-owned. Powering the nation with electricity, gas and broadband across New Zealand.
raw_text_snippet:
Pulse Energy is proud to be 100% community-owned. Powering the nation with electricity, gas and broadband across New Zealand.
Pulse Energy stands for community, connection, and care. As a 100% community-owned provider, we go beyond power by rewarding our customers, supporting households in need, and investing in local initiatives that strengthen communities throughout New Zealand.  
Customer service information  Phone: 0800 785 733 Faults: 0800 785 733 – press 1  Contact hours: Monday to Friday

name: Mystic Winds
description: We are a farmer-run electricity provider dedicated to powering our local communities. We focus on one thing — electricity. No confusing bundles or extras, just easy-to-understand electricity plans with electricity buyback at spot market price. Simply priced. Simply powered.
raw_text_snippet:
